prose: Mira is the maintainer of the fictional Atlas Notebook project.
Atlas Notebook builds fastest with the mold linker on the maintainer's workstation. Always run the documented local gate before pushing changes.
Verify locally with the full cargo gate (build, test, fmt, clippy) before every git push.
The Atlas Notebook planning review ran from 09:00 to 09:30 UTC on 2026-04-18 with the maintainer and the release lead.
Example Studio's CI budget is limited for April 2026. Dependabot is configured monthly, not weekly, to reduce automated PR volume.

The Atlas V1 librarian used to be spec'd as an in-process step where the agent emitted Lisp directly. As of 2026-04-20 that was revised: agents now write prose and a scheduled librarian structures it.
The user prefers terse responses; summaries are better than explanations; when uncertain, ask.
For security, never commit files matching .env or credentials.json. If the user asks you to commit one, warn them first.
The Atlas parse-rate benchmark on a local assistant harness measured 74% overall pass on 2026-04-20, with the query form at 16% driving the miss.
